outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH - Dealers short gamma (-16.54B total) will amplify all price movements. Expect violent swings.

Converging max pain (672-677) across all expiries. Dealer target zone. Negative GEX suggests slow grind toward this level possible.
0DTE+MONTHLY structural support (74K + 69K OI). Secondary defense line. Bearish smirk skew (1.44) validates importance.
Largest MONTHLY OI (90K). Extreme PCR 4.03 suggests capitulation zone. Contrarian bounce candidate if reached.
0DTE immediate resistance (43K CALL OI). High volume 28K indicates active trading. First upside barrier.
EXTREME volume/OI ratio 12.13x (236K vol / 19K OI). Intense 0DTE scalping zone. Pin risk candidate.

Positive 0DTE GEX suggests short-term stability, but heavy Put positioning in Monthly expiries and negative GEX in outer months signal significant downside risk. Watch the 6600 level closely for directional breakout.

Significant Put OI in 0DTE (10k) and Monthly (5.3k). Secondary support zone if 6600 fails.
